LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF THE BIERNAT LAW GROUP'S MOTION FOR ORDER OF DISCHARGE IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT SHOULD BE ENTERED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT PATRICIA RICHARDSON FOR $5000 WITH THE MONEY TO BE PAID TO HER FROM THE INTERPLEADED FUNDS AND ALL PARTIES TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER AND A SEPARATE PROPOSED JUDGMENT TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Order Of Discharge
Off Calendar Mar-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF THE BIERNAT LAW GROUP'S Motion For Order Of Discharge is granted. Judgment should be entered in favor of defendant Patricia Richardson for $5000 with the money to be paid to her from the interpleaded funds and all parties to bear their own fees and costs. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order and a separate proposed judgment to the Court for signature in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-12-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
